parameters.query:
SELECT
  CASE
    WHEN $1::text IS NULL OR btrim($1::text) = '' THEN true
    WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM projects WHERE slug = $1::text) THEN true
    ELSE false
  END AS project_slug_valid,
  CASE
    WHEN $1::text IS NULL OR btrim($1::text) = '' THEN NULL
    ELSE (SELECT slug FROM projects WHERE slug = $1::text LIMIT 1)
  END AS project_slug,
  CASE
    WHEN $1::text IS NULL OR btrim($1::text) = '' THEN 'project_slug not provided'
    WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM projects WHERE slug = $1::text) THEN 'project_slug validated'
    ELSE 'project_slug not found'
  END AS validation_message;

SELECT
  id,
  title,
  category,
  source,
  content,
  1 - (embedding <=> $1::vector) AS similarity
FROM memories
WHERE embedding IS NOT NULL
  AND ($2::text IS NULL OR metadata_json->>'project_slug' = $2::text)
ORDER BY embedding <=> $1::vector
LIMIT 5;
